summary.key_theme: Meta 面臨 AI 算力資源受限與監管壓力，但其在產品創新與能源基礎設施布局上仍具備長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Vistra (VST) Buys Cogentrix For $4 Billion And Locks In Meta And AWS Deals
bullish.reason: Meta 成功鎖定能源供應合約，有助於緩解 AI 資料中心擴張所需的電力瓶頸，對長期營運穩定性有利。

bullish.title: Meta Platforms (META) To Launch a New Line of Smart Glasses and This Time They are Cheaper
bullish.reason: 推出更具價格競爭力的智慧眼鏡，有助於擴大硬體市占率並深化其在元宇宙與穿戴裝置的布局。

bullish.title: Meta Platforms Is Reportedly Getting Into Prediction Markets. Could It Be the Company's Next Big Growth Catalyst?
bullish.reason: 探索預測市場應用程式，顯示公司積極尋找廣告業務以外的成長引擎，但目前仍處於初期階段。

bullish.title: Is Meta (META) Still One of Billionaire Dan Loeb’s Best Growth Stocks to Buy While It Holds Out on Trump’s AI Review?
bullish.reason: 知名投資人 Dan Loeb 持續看好，為市場提供了一定的信心支撐。

bullish.title: Wetour Robotics (NASDAQ: WETO) Demonstrates Conductor Neural Wristband with Training Powered by Meta’s Open emg2pose Dataset
bullish.reason: Meta 的開源數據集被外部廠商採用，證明其在 AI 與物理互動領域的技術影響力。

bearish.title: Meta (META) Turns Inward On AI After Google Limits Gemini Access
bearish.reason: Google 限制 Meta 使用 Gemini 模型，直接衝擊 Meta 的 AI 開發進度與算力需求，被視為重大營運挑戰。

bearish.title: Judge lets states pursue claims that Meta designed Facebook and Instagram to addict children
bearish.reason: 聯邦法官拒絕駁回針對 Meta 的成癮訴訟，未來可能面臨鉅額賠償或更嚴格的平台監管。

bearish.title: Meta, YouTube, TikTok Could Face Millions In Fines Under Australia's Tougher Social Media Law
bearish.reason: 澳洲推動更嚴格的社群媒體法規，可能導致 Meta 面臨高額罰款，增加全球合規成本。

bearish.title: Fear and anger brew inside Meta amid AI frenzy
bearish.reason: 內部對於 AI 轉型帶來的裁員與壓力感到不滿，可能影響員工士氣與長期研發效率。

bearish.title: Magnificent Seven stocks lose $2.3 trillion as AI fears mount
bearish.reason: 市場對 AI 巨額資本支出能否轉化為獲利產生疑慮，導致整體科技股估值修正壓力。

neutral.title: Meta Platforms (META) Exceeds Market Returns: Some Facts to Consider
neutral.reason: 僅為單日股價表現回顧，不具備長期趨勢指引意義。

neutral.title: Meta Shows Urgency as Investors Get Exasperated But Don't Expect a Major Rally Yet
neutral.reason: 分析師觀點認為短期內缺乏強勁上漲催化劑，市場情緒處於觀望狀態。

neutral.title: Down About 29%, Is Meta Stock a Buy, Sell, or Hold?
neutral.reason: 探討投資策略的分析文章，正反意見並陳，未提供明確的市場方向。

neutral.title: Binance Expands bStocks Offering and Adds Microsoft, Meta and More
neutral.reason: 幣安將 Meta 加入代幣化股票清單，對公司基本面影響有限。

neutral.title: Meta says it can read your thoughts without surgery
neutral.reason: 關於腦機介面技術的報導，屬於長期願景，對當前股價影響微乎其微。
